ALL_STAR.title: All Star
BIG_GAME_HUNTER.description: Elite enemies swarm the Spire and drop better rewards.
BIG_GAME_HUNTER.title: Big Game Hunter
BINARY.title: Binary
CURSED_RUN.description: At the start of each Act, add a random [red]Curse[/red] to your deck.
CURSED_RUN.title: Cursed Run
DEADLY_EVENTS.description: Unknown rooms can now contain Elites, but are also more likely to contain Treasure rooms.
DEADLY_EVENTS.title: Deadly Events
DRAFT.description: Choose [blue]10[/blue] [gold]card rewards[/gold] to replace your starting deck.
DRAFT.title: Draft
FLIGHT.description: You may ignore paths when choosing the next room to travel to.
FLIGHT.title: Flight
HOARDER.description: Whenever you add a card to your deck, add [blue]2[/blue] additional copies. You can no longer remove cards from your deck at the Merchant.
HOARDER.title: Hoarder
INSANITY.description: Start with a random deck of [blue]30[/blue] cards.
INSANITY.title: Insanity
MIDAS.description: Enemies drop [blue]200%[/blue] more gold, but you can no longer Smith at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold].
MIDAS.title: Midas
MURDEROUS.description: You start each combat with [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. All enemies start combat with [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
MURDEROUS.title: Murderous
NIGHT_TERRORS.additionalRestSiteHealText:
+{Heal} HP from Night Terrors.
Lose [red]5[/red] Max HP.
NIGHT_TERRORS.description: Resting at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold] heals all of your HP, but costs [red]5[/red] Max HP.
NIGHT_TERRORS.title: Night Terrors
SEALED_DECK.description: Choose [blue]10[/blue] out of [blue]30[/blue] cards to replace your starting deck.
SEALED_DECK.selectionPrompt: Choose [blue]10[/blue] cards to replace your starting deck.
SEALED_DECK.title: Sealed Deck
SPECIALIZED.description: Start with [blue]5[/blue] copies of a single card.
SPECIALIZED.title: Specialized
TERMINAL.description: Whenever you enter a new room, lose [red]1[/red] Max HP. Start each combat with [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].
TERMINAL.title: Terminal
VINTAGE.description: Normal enemies drop relics instead of cards.
VINTAGE.title: Vintage
